originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Debugging Hyperparameter Sweeps and Implementing No-J Algorithm in PufferLib
summary: Debugged unstable automated hyperparameter sweeps in PufferLib by adjusting scale parameters and identifying learning rate bounds. Continued development of the no-J algorithm, which removes gamma and lambda hyperparameters, achieving matching or better performance on Breakout.
